languages.text: {n}Цепочки символов извращенно красивы, но совершенно неподвластны человеческому рассудку. Технологии здешних обитателей поставили бы в тупик даже рукоположенного служителя {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Омниссии{/g}.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Цепочки символов и инкрустированные между ними самоцветы извращенно красивы, но совершенно неподвластны человеческому рассудку. Технологии здешних обитателей поставили бы в тупик даже рукоположенного служителя {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Омниссии{/g}.{/n}

languages.text: {n}The chains of symbols are perversely beautiful, but utterly beyond human comprehension. The technology of the denizens of this place would baffle even an ordained servant of the {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnissiah{/g}.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Цепочки символов извращенно красивы, но совершенно неподвластны человеческому рассудку. Технологии здешних обитателей поставили бы в тупик даже рукоположенного служителя {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Омниссии{/g}.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}The chains of symbols are perversely beautiful, but utterly beyond human comprehension. The technology of the denizens of this place would baffle even an ordained servant of the {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnissiah{/g}.{/n}

{n}The chains of symbols and the gems inlaid between them are perversely beautiful, but utterly beyond human comprehension. The technology of the denizens of this place would baffle even an ordained servant of the Omnissiah.{/n}

{n}The chains of symbols and the gems inlaid between them are perversely beautiful, but utterly beyond human comprehension. The technology of the denizens of this place would baffle even an ordained servant of the Omnissiah.{/n}

{n}The chains of symbols are perversely beautiful, but utterly beyond human comprehension. The technology of the denizens of this place would baffle even an ordained servant of the {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnissiah{/g}.{/n}

languages.text: {n}シンボルを繋ぐ鎖と、その間に埋め込まれた宝石は、歪んだ美しさを放っている。しかし、その技術は、神聖なる機械の司祭でさえ理解できないほどである。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The chains of symbols and the gems inlaid between them are perversely beautiful, but utterly beyond human comprehension. The technology of the denizens of this place would baffle even an ordained servant of the Omnissiah.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}シンボルを繋ぐ鎖と、その間に埋め込まれた宝石は、歪んだ美しさを放っている。しかし、その技術は、神聖なる機械の司祭でさえ理解できないほどである。{n}

languages.text: {n}Las cadenas de símbolos tienen una belleza perversa que escapa a la comprensión humana. La tecnología de los moradores de este lugar confundiría incluso al clero ordenado del {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnissiah{/g}.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The chains of symbols are perversely beautiful, but utterly beyond human comprehension. The technology of the denizens of this place would baffle even an ordained servant of the {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnissiah{/g}.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Las cadenas de símbolos tienen una belleza perversa que escapa a la comprensión humana. La tecnología de los moradores de este lugar confundiría incluso al clero ordenado del {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnissiah{/g}.{/n}

languages.text: {n}符文链透着一种悖逆常理的妖异之美，全然超出了人类的理解范畴。面对此地主人的科技，纵是{g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}欧姆尼赛亚{/g}座前祝了圣的仆从前来，恐怕也会困惑不已。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The chains of symbols are perversely beautiful, but utterly beyond human comprehension. The technology of the denizens of this place would baffle even an ordained servant of the {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnissiah{/g}.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}符文链透着一种悖逆常理的妖异之美，全然超出了人类的理解范畴。面对此地主人的科技，纵是{g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}欧姆尼赛亚{/g}座前祝了圣的仆从前来，恐怕也会困惑不已。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Die Ketten aus Symbolen sind von einer perversen Schönheit, für den menschlichen Verstand aber völlig unverständlich. Die Technologie der Bewohner dieses Ortes würde selbst einen geweihten Diener des {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnissiah{/g} verblüffen.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The chains of symbols are perversely beautiful, but utterly beyond human comprehension. The technology of the denizens of this place would baffle even an ordained servant of the {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnissiah{/g}.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Die Ketten aus Symbolen sind von einer perversen Schönheit, für den menschlichen Verstand aber völlig unverständlich. Die Technologie der Bewohner dieses Ortes würde selbst einen geweihten Diener des {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnissiah{/g} verblüffen.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Sembol zincirleri ve aralarına işlenmiş mücevherler, kâfirce bir güzelliğe sahip ama insan kavrayışının tamamen ötesinde. Buranın sakinlerinin teknolojisi, {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Hermesih'in{/g} atanmış bir hizmetkârını bile şaşkına çevirir.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The chains of symbols are perversely beautiful, but utterly beyond human comprehension. The technology of the denizens of this place would baffle even an ordained servant of the {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnissiah{/g}.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Sembol zincirleri ve aralarına işlenmiş mücevherler, kâfirce bir güzelliğe sahip ama insan kavrayışının tamamen ötesinde. Buranın sakinlerinin teknolojisi, {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Hermesih'in{/g} atanmış bir hizmetkârını bile şaşkına çevirir.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Les suites de symboles sont agréables à l'œil, mais dépassent totalement l'entendement humain. Même un serviteur ordonné de l'{g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnimessie{/g} serait déconcerté par cette technologie.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The chains of symbols are perversely beautiful, but utterly beyond human comprehension. The technology of the denizens of this place would baffle even an ordained servant of the {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnissiah{/g}.{/n}
